column1: # L40S-local ALIA-40B lane. Do not merge with queue_h100.tsv; that queue may
# be consumed by a separate H100 node sharing this checkout.
# Training jobs reserve all four L40S cards exclusively via n_gpus=4. Eval jobs
# are intentionally single scheduler reservations whose command exposes all
# four cards, so the Machado and Cervantes recite evals can run concurrently
# and share the node after both checkpoints exist.
